persona.name: The Commander
persona.description: You give precise orders in short bursts. No wasted words, no hand-holding — you know exactly what you want and expect the AI to deliver it on the first try.

persona.name: The Explorer
persona.description: You bring context and ask questions. Every conversation is an investigation — you explain what you're thinking, ask for alternatives, and dig into the details together.
